tasks.title: Initial Project Scaffolding and Manifest V3 Setup
tasks.description: Initialize the repository with the defined folder structure, Vite configuration, and Manifest V3 manifest.json.
tasks.details: Create the root structure: src/background, src/popup, src/settings, src/shared. Configure vite.config.ts to handle multiple entry points (popup, settings, background). Setup manifest.json with permissions: storage, alarms, offscreen, and host permissions for radio-browser.info.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that 'npm run build' generates a valid dist folder that can be loaded into Chrome as an unpacked extension without errors.

subtasks.title: Establish Project Root and Directory Structure
subtasks.description: Create the primary folder hierarchy required for the Chrome extension modules.
subtasks.details: Create the following directory structure: src/background, src/popup, src/settings, src/shared, and src/offscreen. Initialize package.json, tsconfig.json, and tailwind.config.js to align with the React and Tailwind CSS stack.
subtasks.testStrategy: Execute 'ls -R src' to verify all directories exist; run 'tsc --noEmit' to ensure TypeScript configuration is valid.

subtasks.title: Configure Manifest V3 Metadata and Permissions
subtasks.description: Create the manifest.json file defining the extension's capabilities and security requirements.
subtasks.details: Set manifest_version to 3. Configure 'storage', 'alarms', and 'offscreen' permissions. Add 'host_permissions' for 'https://*.radio-browser.info/*'. Define the background service worker, action popup, and options page entries.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate manifest.json against the official Chrome Extension MV3 schema; ensure no warnings appear when loading the manifest in a browser.

subtasks.title: Setup Multi-Entry Vite Configuration
subtasks.description: Configure vite.config.ts to support multiple bundle outputs for the different extension components.
subtasks.details: Configure rollupOptions.input to include src/popup/index.html, src/settings/index.html, src/offscreen/index.html, and src/background/index.ts. Use @crxjs/vite-plugin or manual rollup configuration to handle extension manifest integration.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run 'npm run build' and verify the 'dist' directory contains separate bundles for background, popup, and offscreen components.

subtasks.title: Implement Component Entry Boilerplates
subtasks.description: Create placeholder files for each extension module to confirm script execution.
subtasks.details: Create src/background/index.ts with a simple event listener. Implement minimal React roots in src/popup/index.tsx and src/settings/index.tsx. Create a skeletal HTML document in src/offscreen/index.html.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that 'npm run build' completes successfully and that resulting JS files are referenced correctly in the generated HTML.

subtasks.title: Final Integration and Extension Load Test
subtasks.description: Perform a final build and verify the extension loads correctly in the browser developer mode.
subtasks.details: Generate the production build. Load the 'dist' folder into Chrome via 'Load unpacked'. Check for manifest errors, verify the background service worker starts, and ensure the popup renders a basic UI.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual verification in chrome://extensions; confirm 'Background Page' (Service Worker) status is active and permissions are correctly displayed.

tasks.title: Shared Type Definitions and Zod Schemas
tasks.description: Define TypeScript interfaces and Zod schemas for the core data models: Station, Playlist, Group, and Settings.
tasks.details: Implement src/shared/types/*.ts based on Section 3.1 and 3.12. Use Zod for schema validation to ensure data integrity during API calls and import/export. Example: export const StationSchema = z.object({ stationuuid: z.string().uuid(), ... }).
tasks.testStrategy: Run TypeScript compiler (tsc) and unit tests for schema validation against mock Radio Browser API payloads.

tasks.title: Chrome Storage Wrapper with Zod Validation
tasks.description: Create a unified utility for interacting with chrome.storage.local and chrome.storage.session.
tasks.details: Implement src/shared/storage/chrome-storage.ts. Create a wrapper that handles serialization, deserialization, and Zod validation. Use local storage for persistent data (playlists, custom stations) and session storage for transient state (current playing station, UI state).
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests using a chrome-extension-mock to verify that set/get operations correctly validate data against schemas.

tasks.title: Radio Browser API Client Implementation
tasks.description: Develop the API client with fallback endpoints, pagination, and rate limiting.
tasks.details: Implement src/shared/api/radio-browser.api.ts using fetch. Support the primary and fallback endpoints mentioned in FR-001. Implement a fetch queue or simple delay to respect rate limits. Map API fields to internal Station type.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests using Vitest and MSW (Mock Service Worker) to simulate API responses and fallback scenarios.

tasks.title: Offscreen Document for Audio Playback
tasks.description: Setup the offscreen document required by Manifest V3 to host the HTML5 Audio element.
tasks.details: Create src/offscreen/index.html and index.ts. This document will be managed by the Service Worker. It must include an <audio> element and a script that listens for messages from the background worker to play/pause/adjust volume.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that chrome.offscreen.createDocument can be called from the SW and that the document is reachable via message passing.

tasks.title: Background Audio Engine and Service Worker
tasks.description: Implement the core audio playback logic in the background worker using message passing to the offscreen document.
tasks.details: Implement src/background/audio-engine.ts. Handle chrome.runtime.onMessage for playback control. Manage the lifecycle of the offscreen document. Keep the SW alive using chrome.alarms as per FR-003. Pseudo-code: chrome.alarms.create('keepAlive', { periodInMinutes: 0.33 }).
tasks.testStrategy: Manual test: Initiate audio from a mock popup call and ensure audio persists after closing the popup.

tasks.title: Zustand Store and State Management
tasks.description: Set up stores for player state, stations, and UI state using Zustand with persistence.
tasks.details: Implement src/popup/store/*.ts. Create playerStore for current track and playback status. stationStore for search results and favorites. Synchronize stores across contexts using storage events or manual message sync.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for store actions and selectors. Verify that store updates trigger re-renders in a test React component.

tasks.title: Popup Layout and Navigation Component
tasks.description: Build the main shell of the popup including tabs and the container for the fixed player.
tasks.details: Use React + Tailwind CSS. Implement the 400x600px fixed container. Create the top navigation bar (Browse, Favourites, Playlists, Groups) and a content area that renders the active page.
tasks.testStrategy: Visual verification of layout against design specs (48px top bar, 72px bottom player). Verify tab switching logic.

tasks.title: Virtualized Station List Component
tasks.description: Implement a high-performance station list using react-virtuoso for lazy loading.
tasks.details: Implement src/popup/components/StationList. Render 50 items at a time. Implement the 200px threshold for fetching the next page from the API client. Use a skeleton loader while fetching.
tasks.testStrategy: Performance profiling: ensure smooth scrolling (60fps) when navigating a list of 500+ items.

tasks.title: Station Card and Context Menu
tasks.description: Build the individual station card UI and its interaction menu.
tasks.details: Component should show favicon, name, country, language, and bitrate. Include an 'Add to Favourites' heart and a context menu (using a library like @radix-ui/react-context-menu) for adding to playlists/groups.
tasks.testStrategy: Snapshot tests for the UI and functional tests for the context menu triggers.

tasks.title: Fixed Bottom Player UI
tasks.description: Implement the persistent player bar with controls and volume slider.
tasks.details: Implement src/popup/components/Player/Player.tsx. Sync with playerStore. Include play/pause, mute, volume range (0-100), and station info tooltip. Add animated equalizer overlay to the favicon when playing.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that volume state changes in the UI are reflected in the storage and that the mute toggle works correctly.

tasks.title: Search Engine with Fuzzy and Regex Support
tasks.description: Implement the search bar with Fuse.js for fuzzy matching and regex validation.
tasks.details: Implement src/shared/utils/fuzzy-search.ts and src/popup/hooks/useSearch.ts. Use Fuse.js with threshold 0.4. For Regex mode, use a try-catch block for validation and update UI border if invalid. Debounce input for 300ms.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for search utility: verify 'Name' matches, 'Regex' handles invalid patterns, and debounce prevents excessive API calls.

tasks.title: Language Categorization and Filtering
tasks.description: Implement the language-based browsing system with ISO 639-1 normalization.
tasks.details: Implement src/shared/utils/language-mapper.ts. Map variations like 'es-MX' to 'Spanish'. Create a filter UI (sidebar or dropdown) that updates the API query parameters.
tasks.testStrategy: Test mapping function with various language string inputs from the API. Verify that selecting a language updates the station list results.

tasks.title: Playlist Management (CRUD and DnD)
tasks.description: Develop the playlists feature including creation, ordering, and playback.
tasks.details: Implement PlaylistsPage.tsx. Use @dnd-kit for reordering. Implement logic to advance to the next station in the list if the current one fails to load. Store playlist data in chrome.storage.local.
tasks.testStrategy: End-to-end test with Playwright: Create a playlist, drag a station to a new position, and verify the order is saved in storage.

tasks.title: Groups Organizational System
tasks.description: Implement user-defined groups for station organization.
tasks.details: Similar to playlists but without playback ordering. Include functionality to assign Heroicons as group icons. Support collapsible/expandable views in the popup UI.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that a station can be added to multiple groups and that group deletions do not delete the underlying station metadata.

tasks.title: Custom Station Modal and Validation
tasks.description: Build the 'Add Station' modal for user-defined stream URLs.
tasks.details: Implement src/popup/components/AddStationModal. Validate stream URLs as HTTP/HTTPS. Assign a 'custom:' prefix to UUIDs as per FR-009. Ensure custom stations appear in search results.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual test: Add a custom stream URL, search for it by name, and verify it plays through the background engine.

tasks.title: Settings Page Development
tasks.description: Create the full-page options UI for extension configuration and management.
tasks.details: Implement src/settings/App.tsx with sidebar navigation. Sections: General, Stations (Table View), Playlists, Groups. Use the same shared components as the popup. Listen for chrome.storage.onChanged to sync with the popup.
tasks.testStrategy: Open the options page from the popup gear icon. Modify a setting (e.g., theme) and verify it reflects in the popup instantly.

tasks.title: JSON Import and Export with Schema Validation
tasks.description: Implement the portability feature to export/import all user settings and data.
tasks.details: Implement ImportExportSection.tsx. Create a blob for export. For import, use Zod to validate the JSON file. Implement the 'Merge' vs 'Replace' logic with a diff summary UI as per FR-012.
tasks.testStrategy: Export data, clear storage, import the file, and verify all playlists/stations/favourites are restored correctly.

tasks.title: Security Hardening and Input Sanitization
tasks.description: Apply cybersecurity best practices including CSP and XSS prevention.
tasks.details: Implement src/shared/utils/sanitize.ts using a library like DOMPurify or custom logic for API-provided strings (tags, names). Ensure Content Security Policy in manifest.json prohibits unsafe-eval.
tasks.testStrategy: Penetration test: Attempt to inject <script> tags into custom station names and verify they are escaped or removed before rendering.

tasks.title: CI/CD Pipeline and Production Build
tasks.description: Configure GitHub Actions for automated testing, linting, and extension packaging.
tasks.details: Implement .github/workflows/ci.yml and release.yml. Ensure npm audit and CodeQL scans are integrated. Set up a script to zip the dist folder for Chrome Web Store submission.
tasks.testStrategy: Trigger the CI pipeline via a pull request and verify that all linting, type-checking, and tests pass successfully.
